title: Sunset Over the Colorado
description: A vibrant capture of the Colorado River at golden hour, painted en plein air from the banks near Fisherman's Park.

title: Lost Pines Morning
description: Early morning fog weaving through the recovering Lost Pines forest, a testament to nature's resilience after the 2011 wildfire.

title: River Vessel
description: A large thrown vessel with textures inspired by the Colorado River bed. The ash glaze was created using wood from fallen Bastrop pines.

title: Main Street Mural
description: A 30-foot mural on Main Street celebrating Bastrop's creative community, featuring local landmarks and diverse faces of the town.

title: Woven Roots
description: A large-scale tapestry exploring themes of heritage and belonging, incorporating natural dyes sourced from plants native to Bastrop County.
